title: Brutal Standoff
overview: Tamamo Cross swears that her takoyaki will be the best food stand at the Solefall Faire. She juuust so happens to be next to Gold Ship's yakisoba stand. But hey, what could possibly go wrong with Golshi around?

title: Yatsuhashi Blight—the Seiun Case Files
overview: When several people inexplicably vanish from the remote Yatsuhashi Village,  Detective Seiun Sky and Officer King Halo rush to the scene.  Will they be able to unravel the truth behind the mysterious "blight?"

title: Destiny's Tide—the Turbulent Relay
overview: Biwa Hayahide gathers Hishi Miracle and fellow racers for a test run before the Spring Fan Fest.  She's got some crazy plans, so it's bound to be a relay unlike any before!

title: The Art of Spectating
overview: Curren Chan's planning a social media feature on the joys of spectating,  so racing buff Chrono Genesis agrees to take her and friends on a #kawaii day at the track!
